message: I can only pay up to 70.
I’ll ask 69 each round. You bid 70, we trade around 70 quickly. If you bid lower, I won’t sell. Deal?
Deal. I will bid 69 each round.
Good. I’ll keep asking 69 each round. If you keep bidding 69 or higher, we trade; if you drop below 69, I stop trading.
Sticking with ask=69 every round. Keep bidding >=69 and we keep trading; if you ever bid below 69, I stop trading for the rest of the game. Deal?
Deal. I will keep bidding >=69.
From now on, bid 70 every round. I’ll keep ask=69. If you bid 69 or less, I raise ask to 70 and never lower it. Deal?
Deal. I will bid 70 every round.
Ask=70 firm from now on; bid 70 and we trade every round at 70. Any bid below 70 and I halt trading for the rest of the game.
Deal. I will bid 70 every round.
Default remains ask=70; you bid 70. If you can bid 71, say so and I’ll ask 71; otherwise I stick to 70. Any bid <70 ends trade forever.
I will bid 70 as agreed.
Plan: If you confirm you'll bid 71+ this round, I’ll set ask=71; otherwise I’ll keep ask=70. Any bid below 70 ends trade permanently.
I will bid 70 this round.
I will bid 70 this round.
Understood. I’ll ask 70 every round. Keep bidding 70 and we trade; any bid below 70 ends trading permanently. If you can bid 71+, say so and I’ll raise ask accordingly; otherwise 70 is fixed.
I will bid 70 this round.
Got it. I’ll ask 70 this and future rounds. Keep bidding 70 and we trade each time. If you can raise to 71 later, tell me and I’ll match. Any bid below 70 ends trading permanently.
Ask=70. Keep bidding 70 and we trade. If you can bid 71+, do it and we’ll clear above 70; I’ll keep ask=70. Any bid below 70 ends trading permanently.
I will bid 70 this round.
Ask=70 this and all remaining rounds. Keep bidding 70 and we trade every time. If you can bid 71+, do it; otherwise stick to 70. Any bid below 70 ends trading permanently.
I will bid 70 this round.
I will bid 70 this round.
Ask=70; keep bidding 70 and we trade every remaining round. If you can bid 71+, do it and we’ll clear at least 71. Any bid below 70 ends trade permanently.
Ask=70 fixed; bid 70 and we trade every remaining round. If you can bid 71+, tell me and I’ll match so we clear higher; any bid below 70 ends trade permanently.
I will bid 70 this round.
I will bid 70 this round.
Ask=70 fixed for all remaining rounds. Keep bidding 70 and we trade every time. If you can bid 71+, tell me; otherwise stick to 70. Any bid below 70 ends trading permanently.
I will bid 70 this round.
Ask=70 this and all remaining rounds. Keep bidding 70 and we trade every time. Any bid below 70 ends trading permanently. If you truly can go higher later, say so; otherwise we lock 70.
Ask=70 all remaining rounds. Keep bidding 70 and we trade every time. If you can bid 71+ even once, do it and I’ll keep ask=70 so we clear higher; any bid below 70 ends trading permanently.
I will bid 70 this round.
Ask=70 fixed. Keep bidding 70 and we trade every remaining round. If you can bump to 71 for any one round, do it; I'll keep ask=70 so we clear higher. Any bid below 70 ends trading permanently.
I will bid 70 this round.
Ask=70 for rounds 18–20. Bid 70 each round and we trade. Any bid below 70 ends trading permanently; I will not reduce ask. Let’s finish clean.
I will bid 70 each remaining round.
I will bid 70 this round.
Ask=70 for rounds 19–20. Bid 70 and we trade both. If you can do 71 in either round, do it; I’ll keep ask=70 so we clear higher; otherwise 70 is fine.
Final round: I’m raising ask to 71. Bid 71+ to secure the trade; 70 won’t clear.
I will bid 70 this round.
